source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.

identity.name: Morphous Horsetail
identity.motif: bottle green segmented horsetail stems with joint black bands and mud-brown bases

typography: Geist-like product sans for dense operational UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels, compact metrics, tabular numbers, and narrow data annotations.
layout: Linear segmented dashboards on an 8px grid, 8px radii, stem-rib dividers, compact forms, command search, readable tables, status strips, and restrained wet-meadow texture.

prompts.label: Transparent Horsetail motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Horsetail transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only isolated horsetail stems for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A small cluster of accurate horsetail stems, vertical bottle green segmented stems with distinct black joint bands, subtle mud-brown basal nodes and wet meadow mineral neutrals, crisp cylindrical ridges, natural plant texture, no leaves or flowers.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show several stems at slightly varied heights, full visible silhouettes, no cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves bottle green stem segments, joint black rings, mud brown bases, and fine linear ribbing.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for transparency removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no flowers, no broad leaves, no second plant species, no insects, no decorative background, no cast shadow, no contact shadow.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Horsetail light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Horsetail" / "Horsetail Stems", derived from the provided horsetail motif cutout.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the motif: bottle green segmented stems, joint black bands, mud brown bases, wet meadow neutrals, linear ribbing, and precise repeated nodes.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, 3840x2160 source style, at least 2400px wide if saved.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board with large readable labels; avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title, motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, generated asset examples.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use Geist-like product sans and Noto Sans JP guidance for multilingual product UI, with tabular numbers and narrow data labels.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise linear data grid, 8px card radius, compact operational dashboard surfaces, thin segmented dividers echoing horsetail joints.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals: bottle green, deep bottle green, fresh segment green, joint black, mud brown, reed tan, wet meadow mist, pale silt, and mineral gray. Add restrained linear data accents only from green/brown/neutral variants.
UI details: show buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, tables, command menu, search, sidebar navigation, top nav, dashboard charts, data strips, empty/error/loading states, spacing/radius/border/shadow tokens, and subtle stem-rib texture.
Text: short readable UI labels only; include section labels such as Palette, Type, Japanese, Components, Navigation, Data, Forms, Table, Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius 8px, Spacing 8px.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no neon, no flowers, no broad leaves, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Horsetail dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Horsetail" / "Horsetail Stems", translated from the light board and the same horsetail motif cutout.
Reference use: Preserve the motif-derived palette roles, component language, linear segmented dividers, stem-rib texture, 8px radii, compact dashboard rhythm, and Japanese typography guidance from the light board.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, 3840x2160 source style, at least 2400px wide if saved.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board with large readable labels; avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title, Dark Mode, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, generated asset examples.
Visual details: dark background derived from joint black and deep bottle green, light foreground from pale silt and wet meadow mist, mud-brown and reed-tan support surfaces, bottle green active states, fresh segment green focus/ring accents, thin black-green segmented separators, subtle vertical horsetail ribbing on surfaces, restrained operational data UI.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; Geist-like product sans plus Noto Sans JP guidance, tabular numbers, compact readable data labels.
UI details: show buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, tables, command menu, search, sidebar navigation, top nav, dashboard charts, data strips, empty/error/loading states, spacing/radius/border/shadow tokens, and texture samples.
Text: short readable UI labels only; include section labels such as Palette, Type, Japanese, Components, Navigation, Data, Forms, Table, Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius 8px, Spacing 8px, Dark Mode.
Constraints: no neon colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no unrelated bright colors, no flowers, no broad leaves, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no pure flat black unless mixed with green/brown depth.
